summary: Single Team subscriber live game out of market subscribed team - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a user is a single team subscriber
AND a game includes the subscribed-to-team
AND the user is not in the viewing market of the game
AND the game level entitledVideo equals true in MAST EPGv3
AND the feed level entitled equals true for the subscribed-to-team
AND the feed level entitled equals false for the non-subscribed-to-team

steps.action: WHEN a user views/focuses a scheduled/in-progress game tile with a subscribed-to-team
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon does not display in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND there is no dark overlay over the team colors in the game tile header
